rationale: Adds Replit hosting support to the Bailey-Forbes-Flinstone C/C++ project. New files include .replit (run='./BPForbes_Flinstone_Shell help', compile='make -j$(nproc 2>/dev/null || echo 2)', modules=['cpp-clang14'], Nix channel stable-24_05, MAKEFLAGS=-j2), replit.nix (deps array listing gcc/gnumake/binutils/nasm/pkg-config/sqlite/openssl/libcunit/SDL2/curl/cacert/cmake/autoconf/automake/libtool/bzip2/gnutar/python3/bashInteractive), flake.nix (local nix develop shells: default, vm-sdl with SDL2, tests with libcunit), nix/deps.json (structured manifest mapping apt to nix package names across profiles default/vm_sdl/tests_cunit/arch_nasm/cross_aarch64), docs/replit.md (Replit configuration overview), and replit.md (190-line Replit Agent policy binding agents to the same versioning/lock/git workflow rules as CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursor/rules/, .coderabbit.yaml). Cross-link updates in README.md, docs/dependencies.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .coderabbit.yaml. version/entries/preproduction 4.1.0/4_1_0_replit_support.ver records DEV_VERSION=3, PRERELEASE=1, GM=0 with a DESCRIPTION matching the change. userland/shell/version_def.h bumps VERSION_LINE 'PRE 4.1.0, BUILD 2' to 'BUILD 3'. The replit.md text says agents should not hand-add under preproduction/ or commit version_def.h, yet this PR does both — but the .ver file documents the introducing change for itself and the version_def.h bump is consistent with the new BUILD number. Clean Replit-support addition matching the PR body.
